subcodes.first_line: O Son of 'Ádhir! God willing, mayest thou be illumined by the lights of the Dayspring of Revelation and be brightened by the radiance of the divine morn [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای پسر عاذر انشاء الله بانوار فجر ظهور منور باشی و بروشنائی بامداد یوم الهی روشن
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @prophecy and fulfillment, @power of the Manifestation of God, @thankfulness; gratitude
